# Q 

2 

M 

GLASS+

## Exterior / Interior / Maintenance

### Enhanced glass cleaner with added repellency.

Q²M Glass+ is a glass cleaner designed to clean and improve visibility while leaving a light hydrophobic effect. It removes dirt, fingerprints and oily residue while adding temporary water repellency to glass surfaces.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_glass_1000_500_2023-1-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Efficient hydrophobic glass cleaner

Q²M Glass+ combines effective glass cleaning with added water repellency. It improves driving visibility in wet conditions and reduces the need for frequent glass cleaning.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons32.svg)

INSTANT WATER REPELLENCY 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons71.svg)

SLICKNESS AND SELF CLEANING 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons29.svg)

INCREASED VISIBILITY 

what makes

Q2M GLASS+ so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/q2m-glass-1-683x1024.jpg)

Cleans glass while adding light water repellency

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2022/10/q2m-glass-4-663x1024.jpg)

Improves visibility in wet conditions

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML

Consumption

40ml/car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

GLASS+

01
Spray Q²M Glass+ onto the glass surface or a microfibre towel. 

02
Wipe evenly to remove contamination. 

03
Buff to a clear finish using a second towel. 

04
Ensure even coverage for consistent repellency. 

05
Reapply as needed. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Does Q²M Glass+ replace a glass coating? 

No. It provides temporary repellency only.

02
Can it be used on interior glass? 

Yes. It is suitable for interior and exterior use.

03
Does it leave streaks? 

Do not over use the product and use clean and correct microfibers.

04
How long does the repellency last? 

It is short term and depends on usage and conditions.

05
Is it safe on coated glass? 

Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated glass.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/18544626040476-Q-M-Glass)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
